---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the course, site, or scorecard is wrong or broken
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What's wrong**
A clear description of the problem.

**Where**
- [ ] Docs / course content (page: ______)
- [ ] Scorecard CLI (`harness-score`)
- [ ] Web scorecard (`/diagnose`)
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Labs

**To reproduce**
Steps, command, or link.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment** (if a CLI/build issue)
- OS:
- Node version (`node -v`):
